name: Pumpkin Pie Squares
recipeIngredient: 300 ml Eagle Brand Low Fat Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, oats and sugar in a bowl.
2. Add the softened butter and mix until crumbly.
3. Stir in the chopped pecans.
4. Press the mixture into a 9-inch square baking dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
6. In another bowl, whisk together the remaining ingredients (milk, eggs, ginger, cinnamon) except coconut.
7. Pour this mixture over the base in the baking dish.
8. Sprinkle coconut on top if using.
9. Return to oven and bake for an additional 25-30 minutes or until set.
10. Serve warm or chilled.
